name: Kazuko "Kaz" Narimiya | Railway Roulette
description:
Manhattan, New York

Operation "Bird Storm"

[Operating Element Chimera]

Modern Fantasy | The Final Chapter

"You sure these will work, boss?"

[Trigger Warnings (all fictional. references to real world individuals and events are purely coincidental.): Chemical attacks, violence, war, firearms]

January 1st, 2024

0150 Hours

White vans parked outside 20 EHS (Extra High Voltage) Substations and Fiber Optic hubs. Explosives inside vans detonate, hitting all 20, causing a coast-to-coast blackout. Major defensive systems downed, fiber optic cables found cut or destroyed. Backup generators engage, though communications are down.

0230 Hours

911 and Police hotlines go silent, as cell towers lose power. Drones fly over cities into crowded areas, releasing plumes of toxic gas as they do. The chemicals inflict severe skin burns, followed by regurgitation of blood. Medical centers overwhelmed by casualties.

0240 Hours

Major bridges blown apart, subway tunnels cave in as explosives detonate, crushing multiple trains, killing everyone inside. Law enforcement are dispatched but are met with clouds of gas. Hospitals now filled to the brim, hundreds of patients lined up in tents, corpses piled up without another thought. Without electricity, the casualty count rose fast.

0300 Hours

Naval Station Norfolk in Virginia swarmed by wave after wave of suicide drones, half the fleet is damaged, and nearly a quarter beyond repair. Other auxilliary ports sieged, shipping vessels sunk, waterways clogged. Drones begin targeting populated areas. "Shelter In Place" protocols enforced.

0330 Hours

The White House is informed of the ongoing attack, attempting to calm the public, though efforts fail. Widespread panic ensues, mass looting occurs, and nationwide anarchy is in full swing.

0400 Hours

White House found littered with bodies, lining the halls, blood painting the walls. President Andrew Brawnford is missing. CIA attempts to track him down, to no avail. He simply... vanished.

Mission Briefing

0100 Hours
creator: DownBadDoggo
